text.title: product-lifecycle Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for product-lifecycle as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Decline is emotionally loaded and agents soften it. Force the literal stage label in the prompt schema and validate the output field against an allowlist.

failure-mode.description: Declaring "back to Growth" from one quarter of re-acceleration after a PLG or AI feature drop.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Single-quarter re-acceleration could be a blip. Require 2+ sustained quarters before upgrading a stage assessment.

failure-mode.description: Conflating company stage with product stage in a multi-product company.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Individual products within a growing company can be in Decline. Specify product scope explicitly in every assessment prompt.
